rationale: Correct headline identity but uses imprecise/non-standard definition 'E[X | F] = ∫ X dP(·|F)', omits the explicit almost-sure qualifier on the identity, and conflates F with a sub-σ-algebra without distinction.
rubric_evidence: E[X | F] = ∫ X dP(·|F), preserving linear structure
makes conditional expectation a linear operator
